title: An act to study promoting access to professional development programming in Massachusetts

abstracts.abstract: Senate, March 26, 2026 -- The committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure to whom was referred the petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 244) of Barry R. Finegold and Tram T. Nguyen for legislation to further assist employees through professional development training, report the accompanying bill (Senate, No. 3000).

actions.description: Reported from the committee on Consumer Protection and Professional Licensure
Bill reported favorably by committee and referred to the committee on Senate Ways and Means

committee on Senate Ways and Means
